prompt:
Assign GRADE certainty ratings to each evidence item below.
Ratings: HIGH (systematic review of RCTs, low heterogeneity), MODERATE (RCT with some concerns, or consistent observational), LOW (observational studies, high heterogeneity, indirect evidence), VERY_LOW (case reports, expert opinion, serious limitations).

For each item, output ONLY the number and rating, one per line:
1. HIGH
2. MODERATE
...

EVIDENCE:
1. [BRONZE] Source: Glucose Restriction Plus Refeeding in Vitro Induce Changes o | Statement: Secretome alterations are linked to health complications associated with weight regain after weight loss.
2. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting and health outcomes: an umbrella review | Statement: In patients with metabolic syndrome, TWF/MADF reduced body weight by MD -2.48 kg vs regular diet across 4 trials (n=268).
3. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting and health outcomes: an umbrella review | Statement: In patients with metabolic syndrome, TWF/MADF reduced BMI by MD -0.90 kg/m2 vs regular diet across 3 trials.
4. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting and health outcomes: an umbrella review | Statement: TRE 7-9 h reduced fasting glucose by MD -2.82 mg/dL vs unrestricted diet (4 studies, I-squared 0%).
5. [GOLD] Source: Intermittent fasting and health outcomes: an umbrella review | Statement: TRE reduced fasting insulin by MD -0.81 vs non-intervention diet across 14 studies (I-squared 94.0%).
